ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the member */,
  "moloch_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the Moloch contract */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the transaction occurred (e.g., mainnet, testnet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the member record was created */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the member holds */,
  "loot" INTEGER /* Number of loots the member holds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is active */,
  "roles" TEXT /* Array of roles assigned to the member */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the member who created this record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_moloch_address FOREIGN KEY ("moloch_address") REFERENCES moloch_contracts ("moloch_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "moloch_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Moloch contract */,
  "moloch_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the Moloch contract */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the contract is deployed (e.g., mainnet, testnet) */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contract was deployed */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares held by all members in the contract */,
  "total_loot" INTEGER /* Total number of loots held by all members in the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the member who created the contract */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the contract */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions related to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moloch_contracts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "moloch_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the Moloch contract */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the proposal is submitted (e.g., mainnet, testnet) */,
  "proposer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who proposed the proposal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the proposal was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proposal */,
  "vote_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the voting period starts */,
  "vote_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the voting period ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes on the proposal */,
  "yes_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'yes' votes */,
  "no_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'no' votes */,
  "abstain_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'abstain' votes */,
  "voting_power" REAL /* Total voting power of the proposal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the member who created the proposal */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_proposer_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposer_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal being voted on */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member casting the vote */,
  "voted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., yes, no, abstain) */,
  "voting_power" REAL /* Voting power of the member at the time of voting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_weighted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vote is weighted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "moloch_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the Moloch contract */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the transaction occurred (e.g., mainnet, testnet) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., create_member, transfer_shares, submit_proposal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction has been reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
